---
title: "Eugénie de Guérin. (Author not named)"
---

## Eugénie de Guérin. (Author not named)

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1864
**Genre:** Non-fiction: criticism
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Christian Remembrancer</i>, Vol. 47, pp. 1-26.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
